name: Wellesley Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
For the Cake:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Microwave chocolate, water, and half of the sugar in a microwave-safe bowl on high for 1-2 minutes or until chocolate is almost melted, stirring halfway through heating.
2. Mix flour, baking soda, and salt; set aside. Beat margarine or butter and remaining sugar in a large bowl until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Alternately add flour mixture with milk, beating after each addition until smooth. Stir in chocolate mixture and vanilla. Pour into 2 greased and floured 9-inch round layer pans.
3. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until cake springs back to touch. Cool in pans for 10 minutes. Remove from pans to a wire rack. Frost and sprinkle walnuts around the top edge of the cake.
For the Frosting:
1. Microwave chocolate and margarine or butter in a large microwave-safe bowl on high for 1-2 minutes or until margarine is melted.
2. Stir chocolate until completely melted. Add confectioners sugar, milk, and vanilla, blending until smooth. Let stand if necessary until spreading consistency, stirring occasionally. Spread quickly. (Add an additional 2-3 teaspoons of milk if frosting becomes too thick). Makes about 2 1/2 cups frosting.
